subject: economy
question: औद्योगिक धोरण ठराव १९४८ नुसार पूर्णतः केंद्र सरकारसाठी (सरकारी मक्तेदारी) राखीव ठेवलेले उद्योग कोणते? / As per the Industrial Policy Resolution 1948, which industries were reserved exclusively as a Central Government monopoly?
options: A. लोखंड व पोलाद, जहाजबांधणी, दूरसंचार / Iron & steel, shipbuilding, telecommunications
B. शस्त्रास्त्रे व दारूगोळा, अणुऊर्जा, रेल्वे वाहतूक / Arms & ammunition, atomic energy, railway transport
C. सिमेंट, साखर, कापड / Cement, sugar, textiles
D. खते, कोळसा, वीजनिर्मिती / Fertilizers, coal, power generation
explanation: IPR 1948 declared arms & ammunition, atomic energy and railway transport as exclusive state monopoly industries.

subject: economy
question: औद्योगिक धोरण ठराव १९५६ ने उद्योगांचे किती वर्गांमध्ये (शेड्यूल) वर्गीकरण केले? / Into how many schedules did the Industrial Policy Resolution 1956 classify industries?
options: B. तीन (अ, ब, क) / Three (A, B, C)
C. चार (अ, ब, क, ड) / Four (A, B, C, D)
explanation: IPR 1956 classified industries into Schedule A (exclusive state responsibility), Schedule B (mixed public-private) and Schedule C (private sector).

subject: economy
question: १९५६ च्या औद्योगिक धोरणातील शेड्यूल 'अ' मध्ये किती उद्योग समाविष्ट होते ज्यांची भविष्यातील वाढ पूर्णतः सरकारची जबाबदारी होती? / Under the 1956 Industrial Policy, how many industries were listed in Schedule A whose future development was the exclusive responsibility of the State?
explanation: Schedule A of IPR 1956 listed 17 industries reserved exclusively for the state.

subject: economy
question: १९९१ च्या नवीन औद्योगिक धोरणाचा मुख्य उद्देश काय होता? / What was the primary objective of the New Industrial Policy of 1991?
options: A. सर्व उद्योग राष्ट्रीयीकृत करणे / Nationalize all industries
B. औद्योगिक परवाना पद्धत रद्द करून उदारीकरण, खाजगीकरण व जागतिकीकरणास चालना देणे / Abolish industrial licensing and promote liberalization, privatization and globalization
C. लघुउद्योगांवर बंदी घालणे / Ban small scale industries
D. परकीय गुंतवणुकीवर पूर्ण बंदी घालणे / Completely ban foreign investment
explanation: The 1991 policy dismantled the License-Permit Raj, reduced public sector reservation, and opened the economy to private and foreign investment (LPG reforms).

subject: economy
question: १९९१ च्या औद्योगिक धोरणानंतर सार्वजनिक क्षेत्रासाठी राखीव उद्योगांची संख्या १७ वरून किती करण्यात आली? / After the 1991 Industrial Policy, the number of industries reserved exclusively for the public sector was reduced from 17 to how many?
explanation: The 1991 policy initially reduced the industries reserved exclusively for the public sector from 17 to 8 (later further reduced over time to just 2 - atomic energy substances and railway operations).

subject: economy
question: मक्तेदारी व निर्बंधात्मक व्यापार प्रथा (MRTP) कायदा कोणत्या वर्षी लागू करण्यात आला? / In which year was the Monopolies and Restrictive Trade Practices (MRTP) Act enacted?
explanation: The MRTP Act was enacted in 1969 to prevent concentration of economic power and monopolistic practices; it was later replaced by the Competition Act, 2002.

subject: economy
question: परकीय चलन नियमन कायदा (FERA) च्या जागी कोणता कायदा आणण्यात आला? / Which Act replaced the Foreign Exchange Regulation Act (FERA)?
options: B. परकीय चलन व्यवस्थापन कायदा (FEMA) १९९९ / Foreign Exchange Management Act (FEMA) 1999
explanation: FERA (1973) was repealed and replaced by the more liberal FEMA in 1999, reflecting the post-1991 liberalization approach.

subject: economy
question: महाराष्ट्र औद्योगिक विकास महामंडळ (MIDC) ची स्थापना कोणत्या वर्षी झाली? / In which year was the Maharashtra Industrial Development Corporation (MIDC) established?
explanation: MIDC was established in 1962 under the Maharashtra Industrial Development Act, 1961, to develop industrial areas and infrastructure across the state.

subject: economy
question: महाराष्ट्रातील औद्योगिक प्रकल्पांना दीर्घकालीन वित्तपुरवठा करणारी 'SICOM' ही संस्था कशासाठी ओळखली जाते? / SICOM in Maharashtra is primarily known as an institution for what purpose?
options: B. औद्योगिक प्रकल्पांना वित्तीय सहाय्य व गुंतवणूक / Financial assistance and investment for industrial projects
C. शालेय शिक्षण अनुदान / School education grants
explanation: The State Industrial and Investment Corporation of Maharashtra (SICOM) provides term loans and financial assistance to promote industrial development in the state.

subject: economy
question: दुसर्या पंचवार्षिक योजनेत (१९५६-६१) महालनोबिस प्रतिकृतीनुसार कोणत्या क्षेत्रावर भर देण्यात आला? / Under the Mahalanobis model followed in the Second Five Year Plan (1956-61), which sector was given priority?
options: B. जड व मूलभूत उद्योग / Heavy and basic industries
D. लघु व कुटीर उद्योग मात्र / Small and cottage industries only
explanation: The Mahalanobis strategy in the Second Plan emphasized rapid industrialization through development of heavy and basic industries (capital goods sector).

subject: economy
question: सूक्ष्म, लघु व मध्यम उद्योग विकास (MSMED) कायदा कोणत्या वर्षी लागू करण्यात आला? / In which year was the Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Development (MSMED) Act enacted?
explanation: The MSMED Act, 2006 provided the first legal framework for recognition of the concept of 'enterprise' comprising both manufacturing and service entities, classifying them as micro, small and medium.

subject: economy
question: निर्गुंतवणूक (Disinvestment) व सार्वजनिक मालमत्ता व्यवस्थापनाशी संबंधित केंद्रीय अर्थ मंत्रालयाचा विभाग कोणता? / Which department under the Union Ministry of Finance deals with disinvestment and management of public assets?
options: A. महसूल विभाग / Department of Revenue
B. गुंतवणूक व सार्वजनिक मालमत्ता व्यवस्थापन विभाग (DIPAM) / Department of Investment and Public Asset Management (DIPAM)
C. आर्थिक व्यवहार विभाग / Department of Economic Affairs
D. खर्च विभाग / Department of Expenditure
explanation: DIPAM, under the Ministry of Finance, formulates and implements the government's disinvestment policy for central public sector enterprises.

subject: economy
question: टाटा आयर्न अँड स्टील कंपनी (TISCO) ची स्थापना कोणत्या वर्षी झाली? / In which year was the Tata Iron and Steel Company (TISCO) incorporated?
explanation: TISCO was incorporated in 1907, marking the beginning of the iron and steel industry in India, which came up only in the early 20th century.

subject: economy
question: स्वातंत्र्यप्राप्तीच्या वेळी भारताच्या व्यावसायिक रचनेत (Occupational Structure) कृषी क्षेत्रात अंदाजे किती टक्के कामगार होते? / At the time of independence, roughly what percentage of India's workforce was employed in agriculture?
explanation: At independence, agriculture accounted for 70-75 per cent of the workforce, while manufacturing employed only about 10 per cent and services 15-20 per cent, reflecting an underdeveloped, agrarian occupational structure.

subject: economy
question: 1955 सालच्या कर्वे समितीने (Karve Committee) कोणत्या क्षेत्राच्या उपयुक्ततेवर भर दिला? / What did the 1955 Karve Committee (Village and Small-Scale Industries Committee) emphasize?
options: A. मोठ्या भांडवली उद्योगांचा विस्तार / Expansion of large capital-intensive industries
B. ग्रामीण विकासासाठी लघु उद्योगांची उपयुक्तता / The usefulness of small-scale industries for promoting rural development
C. परकीय गुंतवणुकीस मुक्त प्रवेश / Free entry of foreign investment
D. सार्वजनिक क्षेत्राचे खाजगीकरण / Privatization of the public sector
explanation: The Village and Small-Scale Industries Committee (Karve Committee), 1955, highlighted the potential of small-scale industries for promoting rural development.

subject: economy
question: 1991 च्या आर्थिक सुधारणांमधील LPG या त्रिसूत्रीचा अर्थ काय आहे? / What does the LPG triad of the 1991 economic reforms stand for?
options: A. उदारीकरण, खाजगीकरण, जागतिकीकरण / Liberalisation, Privatisation, Globalisation
B. कर्ज, नफा, वाढ / Loans, Profit, Growth
C. उत्पादन, किंमत, हमी / Production, Price, Guarantee
D. योजना, धोरण, राज्यशासन / Plan, Policy, Governance
explanation: The structural reforms introduced after the 1991 crisis were grouped under three heads: Liberalisation, Privatisation and Globalisation (LPG).

subject: economy
question: 1991 च्या पैसे तूट (Balance of Payments) संकटावर मात करण्यासाठी भारताने कोणत्या दोन आंतरराष्ट्रीय संस्थांकडून सुमारे $7 अब्जांचे कर्ज घेतले? / To resolve the 1991 Balance of Payments crisis, India secured a loan of about $7 billion from which two international institutions?
options: A. WTO आणि ADB / WTO and ADB
B. जागतिक बँक (World Bank) आणि आंतरराष्ट्रीय नाणेनिधी (IMF) / World Bank and the International Monetary Fund (IMF)
C. संयुक्त राष्ट्रे आणि UNCTAD / United Nations and UNCTAD
D. G7 आणि OECD / G7 and OECD
explanation: India approached the World Bank (IBRD) and the IMF and received about $7 billion as a loan to manage the 1991 crisis, agreeing to their conditionalities on liberalising the economy.

subject: economy
question: 1991 च्या नवीन आर्थिक धोरणांतर्गत (NEP) उपाययोजनांचे मुख्यतः किती व कोणत्या प्रकारांत वर्गीकरण करण्यात आले? / Under the New Economic Policy (NEP) of 1991, into how many and which broad types were the reform measures classified?
options: A. दोन - स्थिरीकरण उपाय व संरचनात्मक सुधारणा / Two — stabilisation measures and structural reform measures
B. तीन - अल्पकालीन, मध्यमकालीन व दीर्घकालीन / Three — short-term, medium-term and long-term
C. चार - कृषी, उद्योग, सेवा व व्यापार / Four — agriculture, industry, services and trade
D. एकच प्रकार - खाजगीकरण / Only one type — privatisation
explanation: The NEP measures were broadly classified into short-term stabilisation measures (to correct BoP weaknesses and control inflation) and long-term structural reform measures (to improve efficiency and competitiveness), implemented via liberalisation, privatisation and globalisation.

subject: economy
question: जागतिक व्यापार संघटना (WTO) ची स्थापना 1995 मध्ये कोणत्या पूर्वीच्या संघटनेच्या उत्तराधिकारी म्हणून झाली? / The WTO was established in 1995 as the successor to which earlier organization?
options: B. GATT (General Agreement on Tariffs and Trade) / GATT (General Agreement on Tariffs and Trade)
explanation: The WTO was founded in 1995 as the successor organisation to GATT, which had been established in 1948 with 23 countries as the global trade organization administering multilateral trade agreements.

subject: economy
question: 1991 च्या सुधारणांनंतर भारताच्या GDP वाढीत कोणत्या क्षेत्राचे योगदान सर्वाधिक ठरले, कृषी व उद्योग क्षेत्रांच्या तुलनेत? / Post-1991, which sector's contribution to India's GDP growth has been the highest compared to agriculture and industry?
options: C. सेवा क्षेत्र (दूरसंचार, IT, वित्त, पर्यटन इ.) / Service sector (telecom, IT, finance, tourism etc.)
explanation: During the reform period, the service sector recorded consistently higher growth than the overall GDP growth rate, becoming the main driver of GDP growth, while agriculture and industry growth showed deceleration or fluctuation.

subject: economy
question: 1991-92 मध्ये निर्गुंतवणुकीद्वारे (Disinvestment) निधी उभारण्याचे उद्दिष्ट सुमारे किती होते आणि प्रत्यक्षात काय झाले? / What was the disinvestment target for 1991-92, and what actually happened?
options: A. उद्दिष्ट ₹2,500 कोटी होते, प्रत्यक्षात त्याहून ₹3,040 कोटी अधिक निधी उभा राहिला / The target was ₹2,500 crore, and the government actually mobilised ₹3,040 crore more than that
B. उद्दिष्ट ₹10,000 कोटी होते, पण फक्त ₹500 कोटी उभे राहिले / The target was ₹10,000 crore, but only ₹500 crore was mobilised
C. कोणतेही उद्दिष्ट निश्चित नव्हते / No target was fixed at all
D. उद्दिष्ट पूर्णपणे अपयशी ठरले आणि निर्गुंतवणूक रद्द करण्यात आली / The target completely failed and disinvestment was cancelled
explanation: In 1991-92, the government targeted to mobilise about Rs 2,500 crore through disinvestment of PSEs, and was able to mobilise Rs 3,040 crore more than this target.
